full_text:
Wei Feng (Zijing) 魏諷 (子京)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Feng (魏諷), styledZijing (子京). Thought of as a brilliant talent, he plotted a coup but it was betrayed and he was killed. Wei Feng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wei Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
